text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's early February, and I'm out shopping with
Winning Ticket.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I got towels, I got sports drinks... Warm
compresses, cold spray—all good!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I think I got all the stuff I need for training. I'm
gonna keep running all I can this month!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
No need to thank me! I'm the one using this stuff,
after all.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Besides, I was just thinking I gotta go shopping.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Heh-heh... Ingredients for homemade chocolates!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
It's almost Valentine's Day, right? I promised my
friends we'd give each other chocolates!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
And of course I'm giving you some too! You're
gonna love it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: On Valentine's Day...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems like most students are having a great
time today, but...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Hmmm... This is so weird...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Remember I told you how me and my friends
promised to give each other chocolates?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
But it's so weird. On my way to practice just now,
they gave me some outta nowhere...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Why now? Why today? Is Valentine's Eve a thing?
choice_data_list: So you didn't give your friends anything?
So you didn't give your friends anything?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Well, no. I mean, Valentine's Day is tomorrow,
right?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: NO WAAAY! I got the day wrong!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
That's why everyone gave me those weird looks
when I didn't give them anything in return!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Couldn't they have at least reminded me that Valentine's Day is today? Waaaah!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Sniff... I'll apologize and give them their chocolates tomorrow. I'll bring yours tomorrow too, okay, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Winning Ticket ends up celebrating
Valentine's Day one day late.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
No matter how long I wait, Winning Ticket isn't
showing up for training.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When I ask her classmates, they say she hurried
back to the dorm, so I go to take a look.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I'm so sorry, Trainer! I forgot to tell you I'd be
late!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Actually, this morning, I got some chocolates
from my fans.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
So that's when I remembered Valentine's Day is
today!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
If it weren't for those fans, I probably would've
made it all the way to practice without even
noticing!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Aww, thanks, fans! You're the b-best! Waaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
...Anyway, I figured if I hurry, I can still get some
chocolates ready in time, so I'm making them
right now.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: But I don't think I can make them and get to training on time...
choice_data_list: That's okay—you do what you gotta do!
That's okay—you do what you gotta do!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Aww, Trainer! Thank youuuu!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
All right, I gotta roll up my sleeves and make
some chocolates that'll put a smile on everyone's
face!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I'll make some for you too, so get ready for
something good!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After she's done, Winning Ticket brings her
chocolates to training.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She wrapped them before the chocolate cooled,
so the shapes are a little strange, but they're
lovingly made and delicious, all the same.
